items.title: Base update on production main
items.description: Perform the update in a clean branch/worktree based on origin/main so the current production 125+ implementation is preserved and updated.
acceptanceCriteria: Branch is based on origin/main at or after commit 58133e6
Original dirty checkout is not modified

items.title: Scaffold task tracking
items.description: Create the required .claude_tasks task log and Ralph sprint files before implementation begins.
acceptanceCriteria: .claude_tasks/2026-06-07_08-07-06/ exists with one markdown file per task

items.title: Update App Store review count constants
items.description: Update the centralized App Store rating constants so public copy displays 135+ while structured data keeps an exact numeric review count.
acceptanceCriteria: APP_STORE_RATING_VALUE remains 4.8 unless separately verified as changed
No unrelated marketing copy is changed

items.title: Verify build and rendered count usage
items.description: Run the website build and inspect source/generated output to confirm visible copy and JSON-LD use the expected values.
acceptanceCriteria: Rendered or generated output contains 135+ for public-facing rating copy
No stale 125+ App Store rating copy remains in rendered homepage output

items.title: Commit scoped update
items.description: Stage and commit only the review-count update plus required task/sprint tracking artifacts.
acceptanceCriteria: git diff is limited to src/lib/app-store.ts and required task/sprint files
Commit message describes the 135+ review-count update
